ead.archdesc:
======= RMM07827Joani Blank papers7827Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
March 20172B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humsxThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:06:04 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Joani Blank papers
Blank, Joani, 1937-
Bright, Susie, 1958-
Sprinkle, Annie, 1954-
7827
12.5 cubic feet. 12.5 cubic feet.
circa 1989-1999. Audio recordings, correspondence, legal documents, manuscripts. Office files, videotape, posters, copies of articles by others, vibrators and massagers, and books reflecting Blank's work and interests as a sex educator and owner of Down There Press and Good Vibrations. Included are many articles by Susie Bright and Annie Sprinkle. Also included is Blank's personal massagers and vibrators collection (1902-2003) with photographs, pamphlets, and ephemera. Collection material in English 9266938
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
October 2016
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, October 2016
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, March 2017
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Sex educator and founder of Good Vibrations, the first sex-positive, woman-friendly adult store in the United States, with branches in San Francisco and Berkeley, California. Blank also wrote A kid's first book about sex and The playbook for kids about sex, and founded Down There Press.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Office files, videotape, posters, copies of articles by others, vibrators and massagers, and books reflecting Blank's work and interests as a sex educator and owner of Down There Press and Good Vibrations. Included are many articles by Susie Bright and Annie Sprinkle. Also included is Blank's personal massagers and vibrators collection (1902-2003) with photographs, pamphlets, and ephemera.
NOTES
Books are to be cataloged individually.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Files
Series II. Audio Visual Material
SEPARATED MATERIAL
Books catalogued individually
Anal Pleasure and Health, Jack Morin. 2010.
Anal Pleasure and Health, Jack Morin. 1986.
Anal Pleasure and Health, Jack Morin. 1998. Signed.
Aural Sex and Verbal Intercourse, Isadora Alman. 1984.
Femalia, Joani Blank, editor. 1993Signed.
Herotica 1, Susie Bright, editor. 1988.
Herotica 2, Susie Bright and Joani Blank, editors. 1992.
Herotica 3, Susie Bright, editor. 1994.
Herotica 5, Marcy Sheiner, editor. 1998.
Herotica 6, Marcy Sheiner, editor. 1999.
A Kid's First Book About Sex, Joani Blank and Marcia Quakenbush. 1986.
A Kid's First Book About Sex, Joani Blank and Marcia Quakenbush. 1983.
Sex Spoken Here, Carol Queen and Jack Davis, editors. 1998.
First Person Sexual, Joani Blank, editor. 1996.
Any 2 People, Kissing, Kate Dominic. 2003.
Herotica, Susie Bright, editor. 1988In Dutch.
In Piacere Negato, Jack Morin. 1994.
Still Doing It: women and men over 60 write about their sexuality, Joani Blank, editor. 2000.
Good Vibrations: the Complete Guide to Vibrators, Joani Blank. 1982.
Good Vibrations: the Complete Guide to Vibrators, revised, Joani Blank. 1982.
Good Vibrations: the Complete Woman's Guide to Vibrators, Joani Blank. 1976.
Sex Toy Tales, Joani Blank. 1997.
My First Vibrator: True Life Vibrator Tales, Joani Blank. 1992.
Period, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. 1979.
Period, revised, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. 1981.
The Big Book of Masturbation: From Angst to Zeal, Martha Cornog. 2003.
Period, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. In Japanese.
Die Regel, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. 1979. In German.
Ongesteld, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. 1979.
Periodo, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. 1986. In Spanish.
The Playbook for Women about Sex, Joani Blank. 1979.
The Playbook for Women about Sex, Joani Blank. 1975.
The Playbook for Men about Sex, Joani Blank. 1975.
The Playbook for Men about Sex, Joani Blank. 1981.
The Playbook for Men about Sex, Joani Blank. 1976.
Cunt Coloring Book, Joani Blank. 1975.
I Am My Lover, Joani Blank and Honey Lee Cottrell. 1978.
The Sensuous Coloring Book, Patricia Waters. 1980.
The Playbook for Kids about Sex, Joani Blank. 1990.
The Playbook for Kids about Sex, Joani Blank. 1980Three copies..
Photo Sex: Fine Art Sexual Photography Comes of Age, David Steinberg, editor. 2003.
The Good Vibrations Guide to Sex, Cathy Winks, Anne Semans. 2002.
Good Vibrations: the New Complete Guide to Vibrators, Joani Blank. 2000.
The Good Vibrations guide: the G-Spot, Cathy Winks.
I Am My Lover, Joani Blank, editor. 1997.
Erotic by Nature, David Steinberg, editor. 1995.
San Francisco: Love and Sex, 2015.
Zeig Mal Mehr, Will McBride.
Cite As:
Joani Blank papers, #7827. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
